title: LANUCN 10 Way Junction Box with Terminal Blocks, 150x110x70mm IP65 Waterproof Electrical Connection Box, Outdoor IP Rated Adaptable Enclosure for CCTV (Black)
features: ✅ 【IP65 Waterproof】 It is especially designed for indoor and outdoor use.Benefit from high performance sealing rubber, IP65 junction box and cable glands have good protection from water, dust, corrosion, rats and pets, durable for years.

✅ 【Durable Professional Material】 Junction Box, Terminal Blocks, Cable Glands, All the accessories are made of new material , they will last longer than recycled material. Terminal blocks and cable glands are made of professional nylon, and terminals are made of zinc alloy.
✅ 【Easy to Install】 Every accessory is prepared, open holes with drill, install the line in the junction box, fix it and tighten the screws, that's done.
✅ 【Wide Applications】 Suitable for electrical installations, outdoor cabling and cable repairs or extends. This waterproof junction box is ideal for harsh industrial or exterior environments.
✅ 【Package List】 1 x IP65 Junction Box, 1 x 12-Way Terminal Blocks, 10 x M20 Waterproof Cable Glands, 1 x 20mm Drill Bit, 4 x Stainless Screws.
description: LANUCN Junction Box is professionally and especially designed for indoor and outdoor use. Benefit from high performance sealing rubber, it has IP65 waterproof gade and good protection from water, dust, corrosion, rats and pets, durable for years. Professional material, easy to install and wide applications. Features: IP65 waterproof. CE、ROHS. Box Material: New Material ABS Cable Glands Material: New Material nylon Size: 150mm x 110mm x 70mm Important: We suggest using the drill bit to make cable holes, that will help keep the waterproof grade .
